title: Markets shortcut: 'eth' not a signal word + crypto-only snapshot served for equity questions
source: T-295 risk_notes (both gaps observed in Ash's 2026-07-12 live session, deferred from that fix)
current_state: Two residual gaps after T-295: (1) _MARKET_SIGNALS contained 'btc' but not 'eth'/'bitcoin'/'ethereum', so 'what's eth at' never reached topic=markets even when the snapshot carried ETH-USD. (2) get_stocks falls back to CoinGecko(crypto-only)+AlphaVantage(needs unset key) when Yahoo fails, leaving the snapshot Markets line crypto-only - and _extract_markets served that line for GENERAL/equity questions ('how's the market', 'how are stocks doing'), which is exactly Ash's 'i didnt ask for bitcoin' complaint.
target_state: (1) eth/bitcoin/ethereum are market signals. (2) _extract_markets detects a crypto-only line (every symbol carries the -USD pair suffix; equities never do) and declines general/equity questions against it - deferring to LLM+tools for real indices - while crypto-specific questions (btc/eth/bitcoin/crypto...) still fire instantly. When the line carries equities, generic questions fire as before.
resolution: Added eth/bitcoin/ethereum to _MARKET_SIGNALS; added _CRYPTO_WORDS intent set; crypto-only-line guard in _extract_markets (symbol regex on the snapshot line, has_equity = any symbol without -USD suffix; decline when crypto-only AND the user's tokens carry no crypto word). 3 new/updated tests: crypto-specific fires on crypto-only snapshot, general/equity declines on crypto-only snapshot, general fires when equities present.
migration_plan: 3. In _extract_markets: parse line symbols via ([A-Za-z0-9.\-]+)\s*\$; has_equity = any without -usd suffix; if crypto-only and user tokens lack crypto words -> None.
risk_notes: The underlying data gap remains by design: when Yahoo is down the snapshot has no equity quotes at all (Alpha Vantage key unset, no index symbols like ^GSPC in DEFAULT_SYMBOLS). This fix makes the shortcut honest about that gap rather than papering over it. A separate data-layer ticket (equity source robustness / index symbols / ALPHA_VANTAGE_KEY) is the right follow-up if snapshot-served index data is wanted.
